description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Docs that runs on push to main and docs branches, and on pull requests to main. Use a macos-latest job that checks out the repository with a fetch depth of 10, sets up Python 3.9, installs Doxygen, Sphinx, and dependencies from docs/requirements.txt, builds the documentation with make, and deploys it to the gh-pages branch using JamesIves/github-pages-deploy-action.
